sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Energy Fuels Inc (UUUU) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
feed.summary: Energy Fuels Inc (UUUU) is gaining investor attention due to recent stock performance and upcoming earnings estimates. While the stock has seen a -10% return over the past month, its industry has gained 6.9%. Analysts project a loss of $0.07 per share for the current quarter and highlight revenue growth as a crucial factor for future performance, with a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) indicating it may perform in line with the broader market.

feed.title: Is Most-Watched Stock Emerson Electric Co. (EMR) Worth Betting on Now?
feed.summary: Emerson Electric (EMR) has been a highly searched stock on Zacks.com. The article analyzes its performance, earnings estimate revisions, revenue growth, and valuation to help investors determine its potential. Currently, Emerson Electric holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), suggesting it may perform in line with the broader market in the near term.

feed.title: Mangoceuticals Stock Surges On Early Success Of Subscription TRT Model
feed.summary: Mangoceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:MGRX) shares are trading higher due to the early success of its new all-inclusive injectable Testosterone Replacement Therapy (TRT) treatment program. The company reported a 336% increase in month-over-month sales for its TRT program since mid-December and a 54% reduction in customer acquisition costs. This $99-per-month program, delivered via telehealth, is expected to be Mangoceuticals' primary growth driver.

feed.title: Equinox Gold Files Audited 2025 Annual Financial Statements
feed.summary: Equinox Gold Corp. announced on February 20, 2026, that it has filed its audited financial statements and management’s discussion and analysis for the three months and full year ended December 31, 2025. These documents are now accessible on Canadian (SEDAR+), U.S. (EDGAR), and company websites, providing comprehensive year-end financial information for investors and analysts. The company's stock (TSE: EQX) has a Buy rating from analysts with a C$31.00 price target, and TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates it as Outperform due to strong technical indicators and positive corporate events, despite a high P/E ratio.

feed.title: Ventas Announces Resignation of Chief Accounting Officer Liebbe
feed.summary: Ventas, Inc. announced the resignation of its Chief Accounting Officer, Gregory R. Liebbe, effective February 27, 2026. CFO Robert F. Probst will assume interim responsibilities while the company searches for a permanent successor. The company emphasized that Liebbe's departure, after 20 years, is unrelated to any accounting or financial reporting disagreements.

feed.title: Denison granted licence for Wheeler River
feed.summary: Denison Mines Corp has received a licence from the Canadian Nuclear Safety Commission to prepare and construct a uranium mine and mill at its Wheeler River project in Saskatchewan. This marks the first uranium mine in Canada to utilize the in-situ recovery mining method. The project, which includes the high-grade Phoenix and Gryphon uranium deposits, is aiming for first production by mid-2028.

feed.title: AES Announces Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) announced that its Board of Directors declared a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.17595 per share. The dividend is payable on May 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 1, 2026. Further details regarding AES dividends and tax treatment are available on their investor relations website.

feed.title: Travelers Companies (NYSE:TRV) Hits New 1-Year High After Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Travelers Companies (NYSE:TRV) hit a new 52-week high after an analyst upgrade from Keefe, Bruyette & Woods, raising its price target to $340. The company reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing estimates, and announced a $5 billion share buyback program along with a $1.10 quarterly dividend. Despite recent insider selling, institutional investors have increased their positions in the insurance provider.

feed.title: Cemex Executes MXN$68 Million Share Buyback Under Ongoing Repurchase Program
feed.summary: Cemex (CX) recently repurchased 3.1 million CPOs for MXN$67.95 million (U.S.$3.96 million) on February 19, 2026, as part of an ongoing share repurchase program approved in 2025. This buyback highlights the company's capital management efforts and commitment to transparency through prompt disclosure of transactions. Analysts currently rate CX as a Buy with a $14 price target, while TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates it as Outperform, citing solid financial performance and positive earnings guidance.

feed.title: Opendoor, Live Nation, Funko, Stitch Fix, and Genesco Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Opendoor, Live Nation, Funko, Stitch Fix, and Genesco jumped after the Supreme Court struck down sweeping Trump tariffs, providing potential relief to companies affected by international trade disputes. The ruling is expected to lower operating costs for manufacturers and retailers, potentially leading to stronger earnings and more competitive pricing. Despite this positive development, the Trump administration announced plans for a new 10% global tariff, which could introduce future market volatility.

feed.title: Cruise operator Carnival to unify dual listing
feed.summary: Carnival will unify its dual listings in New York and London, redomiciling from Panama to Bermuda and renaming the parent company Carnival Corporation Ltd. The UK-listed Carnival Plc will become a wholly owned subsidiary, with the primary listing solely on the New York Stock Exchange. This move, awaiting shareholder and regulatory approvals, is expected to simplify governance, reduce costs, and enhance liquidity.

feed.title: i-80 Gold Corp. SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: i-80 Gold Corp. has released its annual 10-K report, detailing an 89% increase in revenue to $95.2 million but also a net loss of $198.8 million, primarily due to non-cash revaluation losses. The company aims to become a mid-tier gold producer in Nevada, planning to increase annual gold output to over 600,000 ounces by the early 2030s through advancing its underground mines and refurbishing the Lone Tree Plant. Despite operational challenges and market risks, i-80 Gold is executing a multi-asset development plan, supported by a significant recapitalization effort to strengthen its financial position.

feed.title: Joby Welcomes Publication of New Operating Regulations by FAA
feed.summary: Joby Aviation (NYSE:JOBY) announced its welcome of new operating regulations published by the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA). These Special Federal Aviation Regulations (SFAR) are crucial for integrating aircraft like Joby's electric air taxis into the U.S. aviation system, laying the groundwork for commercial passenger service upon aircraft type certification. The FAA highlighted the rules as the "final piece of the puzzle" for safely introducing these aircraft, also specifying pilot training and operational requirements.

feed.title: $2,000 Conquest Cash on the 2025-26 GMC Canyon: Attention, Tacoma Owners?
feed.summary: GMC is offering significant incentives on its 2025-26 Canyon mid-size pickup truck, including $2,000 in "conquest cash" for buyers trading in a competitor's vehicle. Additional deals include $750 cash back for all buyers, competitive financing rates, and a special lease offer. The article highlights the Canyon's powerful turbocharged four-cylinder engine, towing capacity, and trim level pricing, positioning it against rivals like the Toyota Tacoma.

feed.title: DigiPower X Announces Closing of Settlement
feed.summary: DigiPower X Inc. announced the closing of its previously announced settlement, which received final approval from the TSX Venture Exchange on February 17, 2026. In connection with the settlement, the company issued a warrant for 269,231 subordinate voting shares at US$2.85 per share. Additionally, DigiPower X granted 200,000 stock options to certain directors, exercisable at US$2.60 and US$6.00 per share, with an expiry of January 30, 2031.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Mojgan Lefebvre Sells 5,827 Shares of The Travelers Companies Inc (TRV)
feed.summary: Mojgan Lefebvre, Executive Vice President & Chief Technology & Operations Officer at The Travelers Companies Inc (TRV), sold 5,827 shares of the company on February 19, 2026. This transaction means she now holds 0 shares. The stock is currently trading at $298.25, suggesting it is modestly overvalued according to its GuruFocus Value.

feed.title: Black Light Bingo set for March 14 to benefit Kenny Rogers Children’s Center in Sikeston, Mo.
feed.summary: SEMO Electric Cooperative and Raymond James Financial Services, Inc. are sponsoring a Black Light Bingo event on Saturday, March 14, in Sikeston, Mo. The event, offering over $1,000 in cash prizes, will benefit the Kenny Rogers Children’s Center. Tickets are $35 in advance or $40 at the door, with food also available.

feed.title: AECOM and CityUHK School of Energy and Environment forge strategic partnership to accelerate Hong Kong’s sustainability and climate resilience goals
feed.summary: AECOM and the School of Energy and Environment (SEE) at City University of Hong Kong (CityUHK) have announced a strategic partnership to advance Hong Kong's sustainability and climate resilience goals. This collaboration, formalized through an MoU, will involve joint research projects, knowledge exchange, capacity building, and student internships, including the exploration of a dedicated AECOM-SEE joint laboratory. The partnership aims to integrate academic research with industry expertise to develop resilient, future-ready solutions and was followed by a Climate Change Symposium to foster dialogue between academia, industry, and government.

feed.title: Community West Bancshares Announces Retirement of Board Member Tom L. Dobyns
feed.summary: Community West Bancshares (NASDAQ: CWBC) has announced the retirement of Tom L. Dobyns from its Boards of Directors, effective March 31, 2026. Mr. Dobyns, who joined the boards in April 2024 following a merger, was recognized for his practical leadership, disciplined approach to governance, and deep understanding of community banking. His career spans over four decades in banking leadership, and he previously served as CEO of Mission Community Bank and President and CEO of American Security Bank.

feed.title: Dow's 131-point rally led by gains for Amazon.com Inc., Salesforce stocks
feed.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 131 points, primarily driven by strong performances from Amazon.com Inc. and Salesforce stocks. This rally indicates a positive day for the market, with these major tech and cloud computing companies leading the upward trend.

feed.title: AECOM Partners With TomTom to Enhance Infrastructure and Traffic Planning
feed.summary: Global infrastructure firm AECOM is partnering with TomTom, a mapping and location technology provider, to integrate TomTom's traffic and mobility data platforms into its infrastructure planning and transport modeling workflows. This collaboration aims to enhance AECOM's capabilities in mobility planning, traffic systems management, and long-term infrastructure design, utilizing real-time and historical traffic intelligence. The move positions AECOM to better forecast congestion, evaluate corridor performance, and design adaptable infrastructure projects, supporting various transport initiatives and aligning with a broader industry trend towards data-driven planning despite recent government shutdown challenges.

feed.title: BlackRock TCP Capital Corp. (TCPC) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP has announced a securities fraud class action lawsuit against BlackRock TCP Capital Corp. (TCPC). The lawsuit alleges that BlackRock misrepresented its investments and net asset value between November 2024 and January 2026, leading to investor losses. Shareholders who suffered losses have until April 6, 2026, to participate as lead plaintiffs.

feed.title: BioMarin Pharmaceutical Inc expected to post earnings of 62 cents a share - Earnings Preview
feed.summary: BioMarin Pharmaceutical Inc is expected to report earnings of 62 cents per share. This earnings preview is based on information from Refinitiv dated February 2026. The article is a brief financial news piece indicating the company's anticipated performance.

feed.title: Equinox Gold Announces Filing of 2025 Audited Financial Statements
feed.summary: Equinox Gold Corp. has officially filed its audited financial statements and related management's discussion and analysis for the year ended December 31, 2025. These documents are accessible on SEDAR+, EDGAR, and the Company’s website. Ryan King is listed as the primary contact for investor relations.

feed.title: Clearpoint Neuro Inc expected to post a loss of 20 cents a share - Earnings Preview
feed.summary: Clearpoint Neuro Inc (CLPT) is projected to report a loss of 20 cents per share. This information comes from a Reuters earnings preview. The article provides financial expectations for the company.

feed.title: Valkyrie’s BRRR ETF Bleeds Cash as Bitcoin Slump Sparks Cautious Redemptions
authors: TipRanks FX Crypto ETFs Auto-Generated Newsdesk
feed.summary: Valkyrie’s Bitcoin Fund (BRRR) experienced a modest outflow of $1.68 million on February 19, 2026, representing about 0.42% of its $400.66 million assets under management. This outflow occurred as Bitcoin (BTC-USD) prices slumped approximately 22% over the past three months and faces a "Strong Sell" technical signal. The redemption suggests investors are cautiously reducing risk or realizing profits amidst crypto volatility, though it's not indicative of a major structural shift.

feed.title: Can Audi Succeed With the New RS 5 PHEV Where BMW and Mercedes-Benz Faltered?
feed.summary: Audi has unveiled its new RS 5 performance sedan and Avant wagon, which now feature a plug-in hybrid powertrain making approximately 630 horsepower. While powerful, the article questions if the RS 5 PHEV will overcome the lack of driver engagement found in other high-performance PHEVs like the BMW M5. The author hopes Audi will learn from the shortcomings of competitors and create an engaging driving experience despite the added weight of electrification.

feed.title: Cowen Maintains Buy on TechnipFMC (FTI) February 2026
feed.summary: Cowen & Co. has reiterated its "Buy" rating on TechnipFMC plc (FTI) and increased its price target from $56 to $69 following the company's Q4 2025 earnings call. This action signals continued confidence in TechnipFMC's medium-term growth prospects and improved visibility into its project backlog and margins. Investors are advised to consider this maintained rating and higher price target as one input among others, including the company's fundamentals and AI-driven market analysis.

feed.title: Zhihu Details January–February 2026 Share Repurchases in New SEC Filing
feed.summary: Zhihu Inc. filed a Form 6-K with the SEC on February 20, 2026, summarizing its January-February 2026 share repurchases in Hong Kong. The company actively bought back ADSs and Class A shares, indicating a capital management strategy aimed at enhancing shareholder value. Despite a "Sell" rating from one analyst and a "Neutral" score from TipRanks' AI Analyst due to weak financial performance, Zhihu is using these buybacks to manage share float and maintain transparency for investors.

feed.title: Sask. drone maker Draganfly has high hopes for Ottawa’s defence spending spree
feed.summary: Saskatoon-based drone manufacturer Draganfly Inc. anticipates significant business opportunities from Ottawa's new "Buy Canada" defence industrial strategy. The strategy, announced by Prime Minister Mark Carney, aims to boost the percentage of federal defence contracts awarded to Canadian firms from 43% to 70% within a decade, prioritizing small and mid-sized companies in key sectors like robotic and autonomous systems. Draganfly, the world's oldest commercial drone maker, believes this focus on domestic industry will finally open doors for them within Canada's Department of National Defence, leveraging their extensive experience with foreign and U.S. military clients.

feed.title: COPT DEFENSE PROPERTIES SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: COPT Defense Properties, a REIT focusing on properties near U.S. Government defense installations, has released its 2025 Form 10-K report. The report details robust financial performance with increased revenues and net income, strategic expansion in its Defense/IT Portfolio, and successful capital management initiatives. Key challenges include economic conditions, tenant concentration, and government spending fluctuations.

feed.title: ASBURY AUTOMOTIVE GROUP INC SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Asbury Automotive Group Inc. (ABG) has released its annual 10-K report, highlighting significant financial growth, strategic acquisitions, and operational milestones for the past fiscal year. The report details a 5% increase in total revenue to $18 billion and a 14% rise in net income to $492 million, driven by strategic acquisitions like Herb Chambers. ABG also outlines future plans for integrating service offerings, investing in technology, and managing capital while acknowledging various operational, market, regulatory, and financial risks.

feed.title: Extra Space Storage Inc. SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Extra Space Storage Inc. has released its 2025 Form 10-K report, detailing robust financial performance, including a 3.7% increase in total revenues to $3,377.5 million and a net income of $1,022.5 million. The report highlights strategic growth through portfolio expansion with 76 acquisitions and active capital management. Despite facing market, operational, and regulatory risks, the company plans to continue leveraging its financing strategy for growth while maintaining its REIT status.

feed.title: Colliers Extends Maturity and Enhances Flexibility of Its USD 2.25 Billion Credit Facility
feed.summary: Colliers has amended its USD 2.25 billion revolving credit facility, extending the maturity to February 2031 and adding a USD 250 million accordion feature. This provides increased long-term financial flexibility and supports the company's acquisition strategy and internal growth initiatives. The facility also retains its sustainability-linked pricing metrics, aligning with Colliers' commitment to its sustainability goals.

feed.title: YUM BRANDS INC SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Yum! Brands, Inc. has released its 2025 Form 10-K report, highlighting robust financial performance with $8,214 million in total revenues and $1,559 million in net income. The company, which operates KFC, Taco Bell, Pizza Hut, and Habit Burger & Grill globally, is focusing on growth through strategic initiatives like its 'Recipe for Good Growth' strategy and digital transformation via the Byte by Yum! platform, despite facing challenges such as food safety risks and geopolitical uncertainties. Yum! Brands declared a 6% increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.75 per share, showcasing its commitment to returning value to shareholders.

feed.title: Dime Community Bancshares, Inc. /NY/ SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Dime Community Bancshares, Inc. has released its 2025 10-K report, showcasing robust financial performance including significant increases in net interest income, net income, and earnings per common share. The report highlights the company's strategic focus on community banking in Greater Long Island, New York City, Westchester County, and New Jersey, while also addressing challenges such as regional economic fluctuations, competition, and regulatory risks. The company plans to continue enhancing liquidity, managing capital, and optimizing its capital structure in the future.

feed.title: TELEDYNE TECHNOLOGIES INC SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Teledyne Technologies Inc. (TDY) has released its 2025 Form 10-K report, detailing robust financial performance, including a 7.9% increase in net sales to $6,115.4 million and a 9.2% rise in net income. The report highlights strategic initiatives such as targeted acquisitions, significant capital expenditures, and a stock repurchase program. However, it also addresses challenges including economic, acquisition, supply chain, regulatory, market, cybersecurity, and climate change risks, which the company aims to mitigate through operational excellence and balanced capital deployment.

feed.title: Day One Biopharmaceuticals Inc expected to post a loss of 16 cents a share - Earnings Preview
feed.summary: Day One Biopharmaceuticals Inc (DAWN) is expected to report an earnings loss of 16 cents per share. This information comes from a Refinitiv Reuters earnings preview. The article provides a brief outlook on the company's anticipated financial performance.

feed.title: Bayview Acquisition Received Notice of Delisting
feed.summary: Bayview Acquisition (BAYA) received a delisting notice from Nasdaq on February 19, 2026, for non-compliance with market value and annual meeting requirements. The company must appeal by February 26, 2026, or its securities will be suspended from trading on March 2, 2026. Bayview Acquisition intends to appeal, which would stay the suspension pending a panel decision.

feed.title: The Analyst Verdict: Amgen In The Eyes Of 18 Experts
feed.summary: Eighteen analysts have provided ratings for Amgen (NASDAQ: AMGN) over the past three months, with current sentiments indicating 3 bullish, 4 somewhat bullish, and 11 indifferent perspectives. The average 12-month price target for Amgen is $350.61, representing a 6.93% increase from the previous average. The article also provides detailed financial insights into Amgen's market capitalization, revenue growth, net margin, ROE, ROA, and debt management.

feed.title: The Analyst Verdict: Tenet Healthcare In The Eyes Of 12 Experts
feed.summary: Over the past three months, 12 analysts have provided diverse ratings for Tenet Healthcare (NYSE: THC), with 6 bullish and 6 somewhat bullish assessments. The average price target has increased to $259.25, up 5.28% from the previous average of $246.25, with a high estimate of $288.00 and a low of $229.00. The article also highlights Tenet Healthcare's strong financial health, including impressive net margin, return on equity, and return on assets, despite a high debt-to-equity ratio.

feed.title: WhiteHorse Finance to Announce Q4 and 2025 Results
feed.summary: WhiteHorse Finance (WHF) will release its Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results on March 2, 2026, followed by a conference call and webcasts. This initiative aims to increase transparency and investor engagement regarding its portfolio performance and capital deployment in the lower middle market lending sector. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates WHF as "Neutral" due to strong cash flow and revenue, offset by weak technical signals and a negative earnings-call outlook.

feed.title: FDA Grants Priority Review to Savara's (SVRA) Molbreevi BLA
feed.summary: Savara Inc. (SVRA) has received FDA priority review for its Molbreevi Biologics License Application, a significant step for its drug targeting a rare lung condition, with a decision expected by August 22. Despite this positive development, the company currently reports zero revenue and negative EPS, indicating a pre-commercial stage with financial challenges. While institutional ownership is high, Savara's valuation metrics and recent insider selling suggest investors should approach with caution, weighing the drug's potential against inherent financial and sector-specific risks in biotechnology.

feed.title: Deep Dive Into Similarweb Stock: Analyst Perspectives (5 Ratings)
feed.summary: Five analysts have recently evaluated Similarweb (NYSE: SMWB), leading to a revised average 12-month price target of $7.90, a 24.04% decrease from the prior target. Despite being below industry averages in market capitalization, net margin, and ROA, Similarweb demonstrated a positive 10.94% revenue growth and an impressive return on equity. Investors are advised to consider these analyst ratings alongside the company's financial indicators and high debt-to-equity ratio.

feed.title: Atossa Therapeutics Launches New $50 Million ATM Program
feed.summary: Atossa Therapeutics (ATOS) announced a new At-the-Market (ATM) offering agreement with Rodman & Renshaw LLC, allowing the company to sell up to $50 million of common stock to fund clinical programs and general corporate activities. This new agreement replaces a prior one with Jefferies LLC, which was terminated without penalties. A recent analyst rating on ATOS stock is a Buy with a $10.00 price target, while TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates ATOS as Neutral due to weak financial performance and bearish technicals, despite positive FDA-related milestones.

feed.title: AES to pay $0.17595 per share dividend to investors in May
feed.summary: The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) has declared a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.17595 per share. This dividend is payable on May 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on May 1, 2026. The company provides details on past dividends and tax treatment on its investor relations website.

feed.title: RCI Receives Anticipated Nasdaq Letter Related to 1Q26 10-Q
feed.summary: RCI Hospitality Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: RICK) received another letter from Nasdaq regarding its noncompliance with timely SEC filings, specifically for its Q1 2026 10-Q and the overdue 2025 10-K. The letter has no immediate effect on its listing, and RCI has until March 31, 2026, to file the reports or submit a compliance plan. The company intends to file as soon as practicable.

feed.title: Toro Co stock hits 52-week high at $101.20 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Toro Co (TTC) stock recently hit a 52-week high of $101.20, reflecting a 25.15% gain over the past year and a 27.6% year-to-date increase. Despite positive Q4 2025 earnings which surpassed market expectations, Raymond James downgraded Toro's stock from Outperform to Market Perform due to valuation concerns following its significant price increase. InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock may be overvalued and in overbought territory, even as its market capitalization stands at $9.77 billion.

feed.title: Daily Coffee Report 2/20/26
feed.summary: Arabica coffee futures ended the week slightly higher, settling above the 285.50 May26 contract level, with total volume traded at 32,936 lots. Certified stocks saw an increase of 9,638 bags, bringing the total to 449,566. The report indicates that traders are now watching for further technical signals to determine if the market will test lower towards 263 or reclaim levels above 292.

feed.title: BofA sharpens focus on private credit, despite rising fears
feed.summary: Bank of America plans to commit $25 billion to private credit deals, signaling a deeper involvement in the growing $1.8 trillion market. This move comes despite recent jitters in the private credit sector, including withdrawal restrictions by asset managers and concerns raised by regulators like Senator Elizabeth Warren. However, an FDIC analysis supports banks' confidence, showing strong performance in loans to nonbank financial institutions.
